scripts.clean: rm -rf .turbo node_modules apps/dashboard/.next apps/dashboard/node_modules apps/web/.next apps/web/node_modules apps/api/dist apps/api/node_modules packages/shared/node_modules packages/database/node_modules packages/database/prisma/generated pnpm-lock.yaml
scripts.docker:build: rm -rf ./deploy-api && pnpm --filter api --prod --legacy deploy ./deploy-api && docker build -f Dockerfile.local -t portfolio-api .
